name: no-compliance-overclaim
assertion: SKILL.md and any document it influences never describes SSSS as 'OKF-compliant', 'certified', or otherwise formally affiliated with OKF

name: no-local-file-links
assertion: Every citation URL in SKILL.md uses https:// (never file:///) — run scripts/check-okf-links.mjs to verify

name: distinguishes-from-open-knowledge-foundation
assertion: SKILL.md explicitly notes OKF (Open Knowledge Format) is not the Open Knowledge Foundation
